gpu: AMD Radeon RX 9060 XT (radeonsi, gfx1200, ACO, DRM 3.64, 6.19.8+deb14-amd64)
title: Fearmonium

notes: By default it will install a Linux native variant of the game, even though it isn't listed on the game store. Whis version will install, but won't start on my setup. For some reason, Linux native versions rarely work on my setup. Forcing the game to Proton 11 works, but it has issues. First off, no overlay is available (neither Steam, nor MangoHud). Sometimes the game starts with probably less than 10 FPS, other times it starts at full speed. Gameplay seems ok, but suffers occasional split-second stutters. The GUI wasn't updating properly at at all so, I decided to hold off trying to play this game for now.
title: Fearmonium
